compiled_state.title: Update e2e test to verify RELATES_TO_DRIFT handler structural boundary in sprint SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description

Update tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check-e2e.sh to also verify the structural boundary of the RELATES_TO_DRIFT handler in sprint SKILL.md.

### Implementation Steps

1. Add a new test to test-sprint-drift-check-e2e.sh that verifies:
   - plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md contains RELATES_TO_DRIFT handling
   - The handler references REPLAN_TRIGGER: drift
2. This is a structural boundary test (Rule 5) — test the structural boundary, not the content

### File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check-e2e.sh (modify — add structural boundary assertions)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] E2e test checks for RELATES_TO_DRIFT in sprint SKILL.md
  Verify: grep -q "RELATES_TO_DRIFT.*SKILL.md\|SKILL.md.*RELATES_TO_DRIFT" tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check-e2e.sh
- [ ] All e2e tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check-e2e.sh

comments.body: Fixed: Structural boundary test for RELATES_TO_DRIFT handler added — 8/8 e2e tests pass
comments.author: Test
